findings.summary: agents/karta-safety-auditor.md: BLOCKED definition lacks the empty-diff clause ('readable but empty' absent from the Verdicts section) — a readable-but-empty diff fires no signal (known gap)
agents/karta-safety-auditor.md: 'store no loop state' present with no persisted-attempt mechanism in the same file — caps are in-memory only and reset on resume (known gap)
agents/karta-acceptance-reviewer.md: 'store no loop state' present with no persisted-attempt mechanism in the same file — caps are in-memory only and reset on resume (known gap)
